app.name: WAKI
home.nudge: Nyɛ ni kɛ lɛ bo nɛɛ. Oyiwaladonɔ?
home.quote: Nyɛ yɛ oshwɛɛ ni nyɛ susu.
consent.title: Dani yɛ kɛ jɛ
consent.noticeCompanion: WAKI mli nyɛ therapist koni doctor. Ni yɛ nɔkwarɛ yɔɔŋ wɔ kɛ bo nyɛ akɛ.
consent.noticePrivacy: Nyɛ data kɛ tee phone yɛ ji — moko mli eyaa gbɛɛkpoo koni.
consent.noticeCrisis: Nɛ wahala baa lɛ, app mli kɛ kyerɛ nyɛ emergency contacts daa.
consent.toggleLocal: Hila mood data wɔ phone yɛ ji
consent.toggleLocalHint: Eshia ma check-in, mood tracking, kɛ nkɔmɔ.
consent.toggleTrainHint: Kyɛ usage nsɛm a wɔayi din firi mu.
consent.toggleCloudHint: Nɛ nyɛ pɛɛ. Hila nyɛ data wɔ cloud so.
firstCheckin.title: Oyiwaladonɔ seesei?
firstCheckin.subtitle: Yɛ kɛ jɛ kɛ check-in tiawa. Fa nea ɛbɛn wo kɛseɛ.
onboarding.languageSubtitle: {{roster}}. Tap the one you want to use — you can change this later in your profile.
onboarding.nicknameSubtitle: Ŋkɔ nɛ na hila wo phone nko ara ji.
onboarding.nicknamePlaceholder: Wo yeli ala mini laƒi yeli
checkin.title: Oyiwaladonɔ?
checkin.subtitle: Fa nea ɛbɛn wo tebea kɛseɛ seesei.
checkin.followUpLabel: Nyɛ pɛɛ kɛ ka biribi ho? (wopɛ a)
checkin.savedBody: Mɛi da nyɛ ase say nyɛ gyinaa kɛ hwɛɛ wo ho.
conversation.safeguard: WAKI mli nyɛ doctor koni crisis service. Nɛ wahala a, frɛ 999.
crisis.title: Nyɛ ho yɛ nyɛ seesei?
crisis.headline: Nyɛ nko.
crisis.barText: Nɛ wahala le a, mmoa le mli.
crisis.findHospitals: Hwe hospital a ɛle mɛi akɛ
crisis.footer: WAKI mli nyɛ crisis service. Nɛ wahala kɛseɛ a, frɛ emergency services.
toolkit.title: Mmoa Nnwinnade
toolkit.subtitle: Nhyehyɛeɛ a ɛbɛboa nyɛ na bo dwo.
profile.localData: Nyɛ data tee phone yɛ ji
profile.logoutBody: Yɛ kɛ pepa session kɛ ba onboarding.
settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteAllBody: Yɛ kɛ tsɛɛ nyɛ mood check-in, nkɔmɔ, kɛ settings fɛɛ. Nyɛ ni tumi anya bio.
learn.title: Suamɔ
learn.subtitle: Te wo adwene ase. Asɛm biako biako.
stories.title: Gbɛkɛmɔi
stories.subtitle: Nnipa te sɛ nyɛ a wɔhyiaa nsɛm bi.
offline.banner: Nyɛ nni internet so. Nneɛma bi ni tumi nyɛ adwuma.
permission.micBody: WAKI hia microphone ma voice nkɔmɔ.
safeguard.statement: WAKI mli nyɛ doctor koni crisis service. Nɛ wahala a, frɛ 999.
profile.sessionBody: Log out to clear your saved session and return to onboarding.
settings.notificationHint: Get a gentle nudge to check in each day
settings.dataExportHint: Download your mood history and sessions as a file
settings.exportFallback: Sharing is not available on this device. Your export was created at: {{path}}
settings.exportFailed: Couldn't export your data right now.
settings.restoreDataHint: Pick WAKI backup file kɛji this device
